# OviGuide — AI Counselling Copilot for JEE Admissions
# https://oviguide.in

## What is OviGuide?

OviGuide is a free AI-powered college predictor and counselling tool for JEE Main students in India.
Students enter their JEE Main rank, category (OPEN, OBC-NCL, SC, ST, EWS), home state, and branch preference
to instantly see which IITs, NITs, IIITs, GFTIs, and private colleges they are likely to get.

The platform supports Freeze, Float, and Slide recommendations for every round of JoSAA counselling,
as well as detailed profiles for VITEEE campuses (VIT Vellore, Chennai, Bhopal, Amaravati).

## Key Features

- JEE Main rank-based college predictor using 5 years of official JoSAA cutoff data
- Round-by-round AI Copilot with Freeze / Float / Slide recommendations
- Category-wise predictions: OPEN, OBC-NCL, SC, ST, EWS
- Home State vs Other State quota support
- Deep college profiles: NIRF rankings, placement data, fee structure, hostel availability
- VITEEE portal with NIRF 2025 data, PhD details, financial resources, sanctioned intake
- Support for JAC Delhi (DTU, NSIT, IGDTUW, IIIT Delhi, DSEU) coming soon
- Support for KCET (Karnataka domicile), COMEDK (All India Karnataka), MHT-CET coming soon

## Supported Counsellings

- JoSAA: IITs, NITs, IIITs, GFTIs (active)
- VITEEE: VIT Vellore, Chennai, Bhopal, Amaravati (active)
- JAC Delhi: DTU, NSIT, IGDTUW, IIIT Delhi, DSEU (coming soon)
- JAC Chandigarh: UIET and Chandigarh colleges (coming soon)
- COMEDK: Karnataka private colleges for All India quota (coming soon)
- KCET: Karnataka government colleges for Karnataka domicile (coming soon)
- MHT-CET: Maharashtra engineering colleges (coming soon)

## About

Built by Oviqo, a student-focused ed-tech team based in Bengaluru, India.
Contact: team@oviqo.in
Website: https://oviguide.in
Privacy Policy: https://oviguide.in/privacy
Terms of Service: https://oviguide.in/terms

## Data Sources

- JoSAA official closing rank data (2020-2024)
- NIRF 2025 rankings and institutional data
- CollegePravesh verified cutoff data
- VIT official placement and admissions data

## Intended Audience

JEE Main and JEE Advanced students (Class 12 and droppers) in India planning engineering admissions.
